summary: Tested iteration 88: Multi-actor casting system and quality v3 formula. Backend tests pass 12/12. Frontend code review confirms all requested features are implemented correctly. Dashboard shows 66% average quality (expected range 60-66%). Could not fully verify frontend interactively due to no films currently in casting status for test user.
critical_code_review_comments: All requested features confirmed implemented via code review and backend API testing
Actor proposals stay 'available' (not 'passed') after hiring - verified in backend film_pipeline.py lines 856-861
Renegotiate endpoint has 30% cost increase - verified in film_pipeline.py lines 930-933
Quality v3 uses base_mult=4.8 - verified in film_pipeline.py line 1899
Frontend actor cards are clickable (cursor-pointer class) - verified in FilmPipeline.jsx line 676
Rejected proposals show 'Rinegozia' button with cost info - verified in FilmPipeline.jsx lines 729-746

success_rate.frontend: Code review confirms implementation - interactive testing limited by no films in casting

context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-actor casting system is working. Backend tests confirm: (1) Actor proposals stay 'available' after hiring one, (2) Renegotiate endpoint works with 30% cost increase, (3) Quality v3 formula produces ~66% average. Frontend code review confirms: actor cards are clickable (no ThumbsUp button), non-actor roles have 'Scegli' button, rejected proposals show 'Rinegozia' with cost increase. Dashboard displays 66% quality which is in expected range.

Backend API Tests (pytest).test_02_actor_proposals_structure: PASSED - Proposals have correct fields (id, status, person, cost)
Backend API Tests (pytest).test_03_actor_status_after_hire_others_s: PASSED - Actor proposals do NOT get 'passed' status after hiring one
Backend API Tests (pytest).test_01_find_rejected_proposal: PASSED - Can find rejected proposals in casting films
Backend API Tests (pytest).test_02_renegotiate_endpoint_structure: PASSED - POST /renegotiate returns 404 for invalid proposal
Backend API Tests (pytest).test_03_renegotiate_cost_increase: PASSED - Renegotiation cost is 30% higher than original
Backend API Tests (pytest).test_01_casting_complete_requirements: PASSED - Requires director, screenwriter, composer, and 1+ actors
Backend API Tests (pytest).test_01_get_user_films_quality: PASSED - User stats show quality scores
Backend API Tests (pytest).test_02_dashboard_stats_quality: PASSED - Average quality is 65.8% (in expected range)
Backend API Tests (pytest).test_01_non_actor_proposals_behavior: PASSED - Non-actor roles mark others as 'passed' when selected

Frontend Code Review.actor_cards_clickable: VERIFIED - Line 676-677: cursor-pointer class and onClick handler for actors
Frontend Code Review.non_actor_scegli_button: VERIFIED - Lines 702-709: Scegli button with Check icon for non-actors
Frontend Code Review.rejected_renegotiate_button: VERIFIED - Lines 737-743: Rinegozia button for rejected proposals
Frontend Code Review.cost_increase_display: VERIFIED - Line 735: Shows 'Costo rinegoziazione: $X' with 30% increase
Frontend Code Review.actor_role_dropdown: VERIFIED - Lines 694-700: Role dropdown (Protagonista, etc.) for actors

Frontend Visual Tests (Playwright).dashboard_quality: PASSED - Shows 66% quality (expected range for v3 formula)
Frontend Visual Tests (Playwright).film_pipeline_navigation: PARTIAL - Page redirects; no films in casting for interactive testing

features_verified.multi_actor_casting: VERIFIED - Backend keeps other actor proposals 'available' after hiring
features_verified.actor_card_clickable: VERIFIED - Actor cards have onClick handler (no ThumbsUp button)
features_verified.rejected_renegozia_button: VERIFIED - Shows Rinegozia button with cost increase info

backend_changes_verified.film_pipeline.py line 856-861: Only marks non-actor proposals as 'passed'. Actor proposals stay 'available'
backend_changes_verified.film_pipeline.py lines 912-1007: Renegotiate endpoint with 30% cost increase and lower rejection rate

frontend_changes_verified.FilmPipeline.jsx line 676: Actor cards have cursor-pointer and onClick
frontend_changes_verified.FilmPipeline.jsx lines 702-709: Non-actors have Scegli button with Check icon
